tasks.subject: Task 1: Emit routine:updated from the AI bot tool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** After the AI bot tool mutates a routine, broadcast routine:updated to the workspace.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/libs/shared/src/events/event-names.ts (add ROUTINE.UPDATED)
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routine-bot.service.ts (updateRoutine tail)
- Test: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routine-bot.service.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- WS_EVENTS.ROUTINE.UPDATED exists server-side with value 'routine:updated'.
- RoutineBotService.updateRoutine broadcasts once on success with {routineId}.
- Bot ownership failure and rejected status transition do not broadcast.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test routine-bot.service.spec

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/libs/shared/src/events/event-names.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routine-bot.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routine-bot.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter gateway test routine-bot.service.spec", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WS_EVENTS.ROUTINE.UPDATED constant exists", "updateRoutine broadcasts routine:updated with routineId on success", "Ownership failure does not broadcast", "Rejected status transition does not broadcast"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Emit routine:updated from the user REST update path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mirror Task 1 for PATCH /routines/:id on the user-facing REST path.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.ts (inject wsGateway, emit at end of update)
- Test: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- RoutinesService constructor injects WEBSOCKET_GATEWAY.
- update() broadcasts routine:updated with {routineId} on success.
- Creator ownership failure and rejected status transition do not broadcast.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test routines.service.spec

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter gateway test routines.service.spec", "acceptanceCriteria": ["wsGateway injected into RoutinesService", "update broadcasts routine:updated", "Ownership failure path does not broadcast", "Status rejection path does not broadcast"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Emit routine:updated from trigger CRUD
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Trigger create/update/delete each broadcast routine:updated on the parent routine.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routine-triggers.service.ts (inject wsGateway, emit in create/update/delete; document no-emit in replaceAllForRoutine)
- Test: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routine-triggers.service.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- create/update/delete each emit routine:updated with the parent routineId.
- replaceAllForRoutine does NOT emit (outer caller owns that emit).
- Validation / not-found throws do not emit.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test routine-triggers.service.spec

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routine-triggers.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routine-triggers.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter gateway test routine-triggers.service.spec", "acceptanceCriteria": ["wsGateway injected into RoutineTriggersService", "create emits routine:updated", "update emits routine:updated", "delete emits routine:updated", "replaceAllForRoutine does not emit", "Error paths do not emit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Emit user_updated on PATCH /users/me
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Broadcast user_updated to every workspace the user belongs to when their profile is edited.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/libs/shared/src/events/event-names.ts (add USER.UPDATED)
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/users/users.controller.ts (updateMe)
- Test: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/users/users.controller.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- WS_EVENTS.USER.UPDATED === 'user_updated'.
- updateMe broadcasts to each workspace id returned by getWorkspaceIdsByUserId.
- Empty workspace list => no broadcasts (but success returned).
- Service throw => no broadcast, error propagates.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test users.controller.spec

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/libs/shared/src/events/event-names.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/users/users.controller.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/users/users.controller.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter gateway test users.controller.spec", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WS_EVENTS.USER.UPDATED constant exists", "updateMe broadcasts to each workspace id", "Empty workspace list skips broadcast", "Service throw skips broadcast"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Client event types and service helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add client constants, payload types, and onRoutineUpdated / onUserUpdated helpers.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/client/src/types/ws-events.ts (add constants + event interfaces)
- Modify: apps/client/src/services/websocket/index.ts (add on/off helpers)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- WS_EVENTS.ROUTINE.UPDATED === 'routine:updated' on the client.
- WS_EVENTS.USER.UPDATED === 'user_updated' on the client.
- RoutineUpdatedEvent { routineId } and UserUpdatedEvent { userId } exported.
- wsService.onRoutineUpdated / offRoutineUpdated / onUserUpdated / offUserUpdated compile and route to the correct constants.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter client typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/types/ws-events.ts", "apps/client/src/services/websocket/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter client typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Client event constants added", "Payload interfaces exported", "on/off helpers implemented"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Client subscription, cache invalidation, and self-sync
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Subscribe to routine:updated and user_updated in useWebSocketEvents; invalidate React Query caches; self-sync app-store when user_updated targets the logged-in user.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/client/src/hooks/useWebSocketEvents.ts (register handlers, invalidate, self-sync)
- Test: apps/client/src/hooks/__tests__/useWebSocketEvents.test.ts
- Possibly modify: apps/client/src/stores/index.ts (re-export setUser if missing)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- routine:updated invalidates ['routines'], ['routine', id], ['routine-triggers', id].
- user_updated invalidates ['users'] and ['im-users', id].
- user_updated with userId === currentUser.id triggers app-store refresh (getCurrentUser + setUser).
- user_updated with a different userId does NOT touch app-store.
- Smoke-test: AI bot edit of a routine title live-updates the left list; PATCH /users/me updates the user display without reload.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter client test useWebSocketEvents.test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/hooks/useWebSocketEvents.ts", "apps/client/src/hooks/__tests__/useWebSocketEvents.test.ts", "apps/client/src/stores/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter client test useWebSocketEvents.test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["routine:updated invalidates three query keys", "user_updated invalidates two query keys", "Self-sync fires for own user", "Self-sync skipped for other users", "Smoke test passes end-to-end"]}
```
